title: Euphonic Sessions with Kyau & Albert - July 2023
description:
01 Camelphat & Max Milner - Hope [When Stars Align] [TRACK OF THE MONTH]
02 Joseph Ray & Elliot Vast - A Power Over Me [Anjunadeep]
03 Estiva & Diana Miro - Snow Flower [Colorize]

05 Einmusik - I'll Follow [Embassy One] 
06 John Grand - Lucky [Euphonic]
07 Dirty South & Ferry Corsten - Carte Blanche [Armada]

10 Jay Hayton - Feed Your Soul [Enhanced]
11 Dan Stone - Absent Minds [Euphonic]
12 Kyau & Albert - Otherworld [Anjunabeats]
13 Markus Schulz & Diandra Faye - Eternally [Coldharbour]
14 ARTY - Zara (ALPHA 9 Remix) [Anjunabeats]
15 Jack Vath - Breakthrough [In My Opinion]
16 Adrian Alexander - Yara [Elliptical Sun]
17 Focusing - Crystal [Alter Ego]
18 Bockoven - Here To Stay [Scorchin' Progressive] 
19 ACRAZE ft Paige Cavell - The Otherside [Positiva]
20 aname & Lydmor - Someone We Used To Love [Anjunabeats]
21 Jack Trades - Lamai [RIDE]
22 TOMB & LAR - Trails [Monstercat Silk]

25 ZGOOT - Transition [Emergent Textures]
